title: Freebird (cargo hauler)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Youmay|the cargo hauler|the [[Freebird (Sentinel-class)|''Sentinel''-class landing craft]]}}
'''''Freebird''''' was a cargo hauler owned by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Stanz (Bothan)|Stanz]].

He used ''Freebird'' to transport the settlers of [[New Brigia]] from [[Brigia/Legends|Brigia]], and then to haul the [[Chromite/Legends|chromite]] they mined to the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core]].

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Death Troopers]]'', there is a [[Sentinel-class landing craft/Legends|Sentinel-class landing craft]] which is named [[Freebird (Sentinel-class)|''Freebird'']] that might or might not be the same ship.

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]''
